items.name: Ace Interceptor Flight Suit

obtain.loc: Headhunters Patrol Contracts - Ace Pilot Spawns

items.guide: Ace Interceptor gear drops from 'Ace Pilots' who randomly spawn during Foxwell Security or Headhunter Patrol missions. You must grind the base Yellow Foxwell missions to unlock the Orange/Red tiers where Ace Pilots actually spawn. Once engaged, 'soft-death' their ship (often a Hornet Mk1) and EVA over to strip the gear from their body before the mission despawns.

items.name: Arden-SL Arms Archangel
items.guide: The Arden-SL armor sets are almost exclusively premium items. The Archangel and Coramor variants are tied to the Subscriber/Pledge store. The Balefire edition was a CitizenCon 2951 exclusive. Players can only find pieces of these sets in-game by pure luck in rare outpost loot crates or by looting a player who brought it from their hangar.
